global.description: The ad features a modern design with a clear promotional message and a strong call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting special fares for smarter flying options.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central abstract shapes
elements.description: This element features a combination of geometric shapes, including a large rectangle and a smaller circle, rendered in a soft color palette.

elements.label: Central abstract shapes
elements.description: This element consists of a large rectangle with rounded corners, overlaid on a background of soft colors, creating a modern and minimalistic look.

elements.label: Small abstract shape
elements.description: This element is a small circle positioned towards the bottom of the larger shapes, adding a playful touch to the design.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: The text 'HorizonHop' is displayed prominently at the top in bold, modern typography, contrasting against a vibrant background.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: The phrase 'Fly smarter Special fares today' is presented in a clear, inviting font, positioned centrally to attract attention.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The text 'Order now' is displayed in a bold, eye-catching button format at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalistic with soft colors, HorizonHop logo, promotional message, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main body text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: HorizonHop, Fly smarter Special fares today, Order now
